---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 提出新功能或改进建议 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**功能描述 / Description**
简要描述你希望的功能。/ Describe the feature you'd like.

**使用场景 / Use Case**
该功能解决什么问题？/ What problem does this solve?

**备选方案 / Alternatives**
是否考虑过其他方案？/ Have you considered any alternatives?
